app_release_notes: v1.2.10 - "Save this target & go to next" now shows a Saving... indicator so a slow save reads as working, not frozen. The Barrels round-count buttons render as clear -/+ on every Mac (they were blank boxes for some setups). And the sample Tikka rifle and demo barrel no longer file themselves into your real Libraries when you browse the demo.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.2.10 - "Save this target & go to next" now shows a Saving... indicator so a slow save reads as working, not frozen. The Barrels round-count buttons render as clear -/+ on every Mac (they were blank boxes for some setups). And the sample Tikka rifle and demo barrel no longer file themselves into your real Libraries when you browse the demo.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.6 - Compare Loads now shows every load you've saved across all your workbooks (grouped by rifle), and the Load Card prints the correct group, mean radius, and vertical SD for a powder-charge winner. Includes the 1.2.4/1.2.5 import fixes: Garmin xlsx import, target groups auto-pair by shot order, and cleaner staged-file handling.
